description: Canonical architecture definition for SAVERSSYSTEM™. This record defines the operating structure of the merchant database monetization system and the relationships between its primary architectural layers.

asset.name: Merchant Customer Database
asset.role: Foundational business asset containing existing customer relationships and participation history.

activation.name: Participation Model
activation.role: Activates merchant customer relationships by creating meaningful participation events.

technology.name: SAVERS APP Transaction Recognition
technology.role: Recognizes qualifying transactions and participation events, creating verifiable activity records.

economics.name: Revenue Distribution
economics.role: Distributes economic value generated through recognized participation and transaction activity.

outcome.name: Recurring Economic Activity
outcome.role: Produces measurable recurring value for merchants, participants, and ecosystem partners.

principles: Existing customer relationships are economic assets.
Recurring participation produces recurring economic activity.
